title: I need only 1 seat for a pro-plan. or as a student using pro, i need to be able to use time tracker feature.

I need only 1 seat for a pro-plan. or as a student using pro, i need to be able to use time tracker feature. I can’t afford to pay for 2 seats or three seat. I am a student.

posts.author: testuser90 (Habeeb  E Sadeed)
posts.cookedHtml:
I need only 1 seat for a pro-plan. or as a student using pro, i need to be able to use time tracker feature. I can’t afford to pay for 2 seats or three seat. I am a student.

All you need to know about our new Feature Request process
